name: @openvideo/electron
description: OpenVideo Electron shell (ADR-0001). Spawns the daemon (via ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE, so a packaged app needs no separate Node.js install) and loads its served UI in a BrowserWindow. Currently loads the daemon's static cockpit fallback (apps/cockpit/public) — pointing it at the full Next.js Studio app is a follow-up (needs either a daemon-served static Studio export or a second managed process for `next start`), documented honestly rather than half-wired.
